course_title: Topics in Italian Culture: Screening Italy
subject: ITAL
course_description: Topics to be announced each semester. Course content will vary, including topics of literature, history, culture, art history, political thought, business, current trends, and more. May be repeated for credit when syllabus changes.
course_notes: (Same as FILM 286 1) MCP Elective An introduction to Italian media and the way that it functions as a cultural, creative, political, and economic force. Through lectures, social media analysis, media screenings, assigned readings, and weekly response papers, the course explores how Italian media reflects and magnifies broader issues of nationalism, race, gender, sexuality, and fandom. Each student will write responses, present a selected media example, follow and analyze an Italian social media influencer or series, and complete a final creative project.
